title: Punctuation: period and comma
description: Block 2 opens with the two most common punctuation marks — period and comma
text: yes, it works. she said, this is fine. then, we go. ready, set, type, and breathe.
tips: Period (.) — right ring finger, no shift needed
Comma (,) — right middle finger, bottom row
Always space AFTER punctuation, not before

character_tips.anna: Punctuation lives on the bottom row. Period — ring finger, comma — middle.
character_tips.maxim: Standard rule: one space after period or comma, never before.
character_tips.knopych: Punctuation power! . and , — unlock real sentences! ⚡
character_tips.klavochka: Beautiful pauses, sunshine! Like breathing in writing! 💫
